meaning: n.老兵,老手,富有经验的人,退伍军人adj.老兵的,经验丰富的
examples: He is a veteran parliamentarian whose views enjoy widespread respect.
"Hedge funds used to be set up by two guys in a back alley with a flashlight," says one veteran.
If your project is being resisted, for example, by a group of veteran employees, ask another old-timer to speak up for it.
And yet the engine, that growling, fierce-sounding engine, is actually a veteran 4.2-litre straight-six from Jaguar.
This week he hired Merrill Lynch veteran James Gorman James Gorman to run the retail brokerage.
